creator: monkeyman_stones@hotmail.com
text:
I failed to mention that this problem was experienced in the HP HDX18t notebook during the installation attempts of both freeBSD/PC-BSD 8.2 and freeBSD PC-BSD 9.0 Beta 2 in my previous report. The video is an install of PC-BSD/freeBSD 9.0 Beta2 64-bit.

David
Monkeyman_Stones@Comcast.net
